thousand-arrows.short_effect: Grounds the target, and hits even Flying-type or levitating Pokémon.
thousand-arrows.short_effect_zh: 可以击中浮在空中的宝可梦。 空中的对手被击落后， 会掉到地面。

thousand-waves.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
thousand-waves.short_effect_zh: 从地面掀起波浪进行攻击。 被掀入波浪中的对手， 将无法从战斗中逃走。

lands-wrath.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
lands-wrath.short_effect_zh: 聚集大地的力量， 将此力量集中攻击对手， 并给予伤害。

light-of-ruin.short_effect: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.
light-of-ruin.short_effect_zh: 借用永恒之花的力量， 发射出强力光线。 自己也会受到不小的伤害。

origin-pulse.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
origin-pulse.short_effect_zh: 用无数青白色 且闪耀的光线攻击对手。

precipice-blades.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
precipice-blades.short_effect_zh: 将大地的力量变化为利刃 攻击对手。

dragon-ascent.short_effect: Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
dragon-ascent.short_effect_zh: 从天空中急速下降攻击对手。 自己的防御和特防会降低。

hyperspace-fury.short_effect_zh: 用许多手臂，无视对手的 守住或看穿等招式进行连续攻击， 自己的防御会降低。

breakneck-blitz--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
breakneck-blitz--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量气势猛烈地 全力撞上对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

breakneck-blitz--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

all-out-pummeling--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
all-out-pummeling--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量制造出能量弹， 全力撞向对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

all-out-pummeling--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

supersonic-skystrike--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
supersonic-skystrike--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量猛烈地飞向天空， 朝对手全力落下。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

supersonic-skystrike--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

acid-downpour--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
acid-downpour--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量使毒沼涌起， 全力让对手沉下去。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

acid-downpour--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

tectonic-rage--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
tectonic-rage--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量潜入地里最深处， 全力撞上对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

tectonic-rage--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

continental-crush--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
continental-crush--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量召唤大大的岩山， 全力撞向对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

continental-crush--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

savage-spin-out--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
savage-spin-out--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量将吐出的丝线 全力束缚对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

savage-spin-out--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

never-ending-nightmare--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
never-ending-nightmare--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量召唤强烈的怨念， 全力降临到对手身上。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

never-ending-nightmare--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

corkscrew-crash--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
corkscrew-crash--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量进行高速旋转， 全力撞上对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

corkscrew-crash--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

inferno-overdrive--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
inferno-overdrive--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量喷出熊熊烈火， 全力撞向对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

inferno-overdrive--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

hydro-vortex--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
hydro-vortex--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量制造大大的潮旋， 全力吞没对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

hydro-vortex--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

bloom-doom--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
bloom-doom--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量借助花草的能量， 全力攻击对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

bloom-doom--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

gigavolt-havoc--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
gigavolt-havoc--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量将蓄积的强大电流 全力撞向对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

gigavolt-havoc--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shattered-psyche--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
shattered-psyche--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量操纵对手， 全力使其感受到痛苦。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

shattered-psyche--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

subzero-slammer--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
subzero-slammer--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量急剧降低气温， 全力冰冻对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

subzero-slammer--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

devastating-drake--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
devastating-drake--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量将气场实体化， 向对手全力发动袭击。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

devastating-drake--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

black-hole-eclipse--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
black-hole-eclipse--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量收集恶能量， 全力将对手吸入。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

black-hole-eclipse--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

twinkle-tackle--physical.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
twinkle-tackle--physical.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量制造魅惑空间， 全力捉弄对手。 威力会根据原来的招式而改变。

twinkle-tackle--special.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

catastropika.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
catastropika.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量， 皮卡丘全身覆盖最强电力， 全力猛扑对手。

shore-up.short_effect: Heals the user for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ during a sandstorm.
shore-up.short_effect_zh: 回复自己最大ＨＰ的一半。 在沙暴中回复得更多。

first-impression.short_effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.
first-impression.short_effect_zh: 威力很高的招式， 但只有在出场战斗时， 立刻使出才能成功。

baneful-bunker.short_effect: Grants the user protection for the rest of the turn and poisons any Pokémon that tries to use a contact move on it.
baneful-bunker.short_effect_zh: 防住对手攻击的同时， 让接触到自己的对手中毒。

spirit-shackle.short_effect_zh: 攻击的同时， 缝住对手的影子， 使其无法逃走。

darkest-lariat.short_effect_zh: 旋转双臂打向对手。 无视对手的能力变化， 直接给予伤害。

sparkling-aria.short_effect_zh: 随着唱歌会放出很多气球。 受到此招式攻击时， 灼伤会被治愈。

ice-hammer.short_effect: Lowers user’s Speed by one stage.
ice-hammer.short_effect_zh: 挥舞强力而沉重的拳头， 给予对手伤害。 自己的速度会降低。

floral-healing.short_effect: Heals the target for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ on Grassy Terrain.
floral-healing.short_effect_zh: 回复对手最大ＨＰ的一半。 在青草场地时，效果会提高。

high-horsepower.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
high-horsepower.short_effect_zh: 使出全身力量， 猛攻对手。

strength-sap.short_effect: Heals the user by the target’s current Attack stat and lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
strength-sap.short_effect_zh: 给自己回复和对手攻击力 相同数值的ＨＰ， 然后降低对手的攻击。

solar-blade.short_effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
solar-blade.short_effect_zh: 第１回合收集满满的日光， 第２回合将此力量 集中在剑上进行攻击。

leafage.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
leafage.short_effect_zh: 将叶片打向对手， 进行攻击。

spotlight.short_effect: Forces the target’s opponents to aim at the target for the rest of the turn.
spotlight.short_effect_zh: 给宝可梦打上聚光灯， 该回合只能瞄准该宝可梦。

toxic-thread.short_effect: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.
toxic-thread.short_effect_zh: 将混有毒的丝吐向对手。 使其中毒， 从而降低对手的速度。

laser-focus.short_effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user’s next move.
laser-focus.short_effect_zh: 集中精神， 下次攻击必定会击中要害。

gear-up.short_effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.
gear-up.short_effect_zh: 启动齿轮， 提高特性为正电和负电的 宝可梦的攻击和特攻。

throat-chop.short_effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.
throat-chop.short_effect_zh: 受到此招式攻击的对手， 会因为地狱般的痛苦，在２回合内， 变得无法使出声音类招式。

pollen-puff.short_effect: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.
pollen-puff.short_effect_zh: 对敌人使用是会爆炸的团子。 对我方使用则是给予回复的团子。

anchor-shot.short_effect_zh: 将锚缠住对手进行攻击。 使对手无法逃走。

psychic-terrain.short_effect: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their  Psychic moves by 50%.
psychic-terrain.short_effect_zh: 在５回合内，地面上的宝可梦 不会受到先制招式的攻击。 超能力属性的招式威力会提高。

lunge.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
lunge.short_effect_zh: 全力猛扑对手进行攻击。 从而降低对手的攻击。

fire-lash.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
fire-lash.short_effect_zh: 用燃烧的鞭子抽打对手。 受到攻击的对手防御会降低。

power-trip.short_effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
power-trip.short_effect_zh: 耀武扬威地攻击对手， 自己的能力提高得越多， 威力就越大。

burn-up.short_effect: Removes the user’s fire type after inflicting damage.
burn-up.short_effect_zh: 将自己全身燃烧起火焰来， 给予对手大大的伤害。 自己的火属性将会消失。

speed-swap.short_effect: Exchanges the user’s Speed with the target’s.
speed-swap.short_effect_zh: 将对手和自己的速度 进行互换。

smart-strike.short_effect_zh: 用尖尖的角刺入对手进行攻击。 攻击必定会命中。

purify.short_effect: Cures the target of a major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP.
purify.short_effect_zh: 治愈对手的异常状态。 治愈后可以回复自己的ＨＰ。

revelation-dance.short_effect: Has the same type as the user.
revelation-dance.short_effect_zh: 全力跳舞进行攻击。 此招式的属性将 变得和自己的属性相同。

core-enforcer.short_effect: Nullifies the target’s ability if it moves earlier.
core-enforcer.short_effect_zh: 如果给予过伤害的对手 已经结束行动， 其特性就会被消除。

trop-kick.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
trop-kick.short_effect_zh: 向对手使出来自南国的火热脚踢。 从而降低对手的攻击。

instruct.short_effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move.
instruct.short_effect_zh: 向对手下达指示， 让其再次使出刚才的招式。

beak-blast.short_effect: Inflicts a burn on any Pokémon that makes contact before the attack.
beak-blast.short_effect_zh: 先加热鸟嘴后再进行攻击。 鸟嘴在加热时对手触碰的话， 就会使其灼伤。

clanging-scales.short_effect: Lowers the user’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
clanging-scales.short_effect_zh: 摩擦全身鳞片， 发出响亮的声音进行攻击。 攻击后自己的防御会降低。

dragon-hammer.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dragon-hammer.short_effect_zh: 将身体当作锤子， 向对手发动袭击， 给予伤害。

brutal-swing.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
brutal-swing.short_effect_zh: 用自己的身体狂舞挥打， 给予对手伤害。

aurora-veil.short_effect: Reduces damage five turns, but must be used during hail.
aurora-veil.short_effect_zh: 在５回合内减弱 物理和特殊的伤害。 只有冰雹时才能使出。

sinister-arrow-raid.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
sinister-arrow-raid.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量制造出 无数箭的狙射树枭 将全力射穿对手进行攻击。

malicious-moonsault.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
malicious-moonsault.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量得到 强壮肉体的炽焰咆哮虎 将全力撞向对手进行攻击。

oceanic-operetta.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
oceanic-operetta.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量召唤 大量水的西狮海壬 将全力攻击对手。

guardian-of-alola.short_effect: Damages the target for 75% of its remaining HP.
guardian-of-alola.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量得到阿罗拉之力的 土地神宝可梦将全力进行攻击。 对手的剩余ＨＰ会减少很多。

soul-stealing-7-star-strike.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
soul-stealing-7-star-strike.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的玛夏多 将全力使出拳头和脚踢的 连续招式叩打对手。

stoked-sparksurfer.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.
stoked-sparksurfer.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的阿罗拉地区的 雷丘将全力进行攻击。 从而让对手陷入麻痹状态。

pulverizing-pancake.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
pulverizing-pancake.short_effect_zh: 通过Ｚ力量使得认真起来的 卡比兽跃动巨大身躯， 全力向对手发动袭击。

extreme-evoboost.short_effect: Raises all of the user’s stats by two stages.
extreme-evoboost.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的伊布 将借助进化后伙伴们的力量， 大幅提高能力。

genesis-supernova.short_effect: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain after inflicting damage.
genesis-supernova.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的梦幻 将全力攻击对手。 脚下会变成精神场地。

shell-trap.short_effect: Only inflicts damage if the user was hit by a physical move this turn.
shell-trap.short_effect_zh: 设下甲壳陷阱。 如果对手使出物理招式， 陷阱就会爆炸并给予对手伤害。

fleur-cannon.short_effect: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
fleur-cannon.short_effect_zh: 放出强力光束后， 自己的特攻会大幅降低。

psychic-fangs.short_effect_zh: 利用精神力量咬住对手进行攻击。 还可以破坏光墙和反射壁等。

stomping-tantrum.short_effect: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.
stomping-tantrum.short_effect_zh: 化悔恨为力量进行攻击。 如果上一回合招式没有打中， 威力就会翻倍。

shadow-bone.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
shadow-bone.short_effect_zh: 用附有灵魂的骨头 殴打对手进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的防御。

accelerock.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
accelerock.short_effect_zh: 迅速撞向对手进行攻击。 必定能够先制攻击。

liquidation.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
liquidation.short_effect_zh: 用水之力量撞向对手进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的防御。

prismatic-laser.short_effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
prismatic-laser.short_effect_zh: 用棱镜的力量发射强烈光线。 下一回合自己将无法动弹。

spectral-thief.short_effect: Steals the target’s stat increases, then inflicts damage.
spectral-thief.short_effect_zh: 潜入对手的影子进行攻击。 会夺取对手的能力提升。

sunsteel-strike.short_effect_zh: 以流星般的气势猛撞对手。 可以无视对手的特性进行攻击。

moongeist-beam.short_effect_zh: 放出奇怪的光线攻击对手。 可以无视对手的特性进行攻击。

tearful-look.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
tearful-look.short_effect_zh: 变得泪眼汪汪， 让对手丧失斗志。 从而降低对手的攻击和特攻。

zing-zap.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
zing-zap.short_effect_zh: 撞向对手，并发出强电， 使其感到麻麻刺刺的。 有时会使对手畏缩。

natures-madness.short_effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
natures-madness.short_effect_zh: 向对手释放自然之怒。 对手的ＨＰ会减半。

multi-attack.short_effect: If the user is holding a appropriate plate or drive, the damage inflicted will match it.
multi-attack.short_effect_zh: 一边覆盖高能量， 一边撞向对手进行攻击。 根据存储碟不同，属性会改变。

10-000-000-volt-thunderbolt.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
10-000-000-volt-thunderbolt.short_effect_zh: 戴着帽子的皮卡丘将通过Ｚ力量 增强的电击全力释放给对手。 容易击中要害。

mind-blown.short_effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.
mind-blown.short_effect_zh: 让自己的头爆炸， 来攻击周围的一切。 自己也会受到伤害。

plasma-fists.short_effect: After inflicting damage, causes all Normal-type moves to become Electric-type for the remainder of the turn.
plasma-fists.short_effect_zh: 用覆盖着电流的拳头进行攻击。 使一般属性的招式变成电属性。

photon-geyser.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
photon-geyser.short_effect_zh: 用光柱来进行攻击。 比较自己的攻击和特攻， 用数值相对较高的一项给予对方伤害。

light-that-burns-the-sky.short_effect: Inflicts damage using either Attack or Special Attack stat, whichever is higher.
light-that-burns-the-sky.short_effect_zh: 奈克洛兹玛会无视对手的特性效果， 在攻击和特攻之间， 用数值相对较高的一项给予对方伤害。

searing-sunraze-smash.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的索尔迦雷欧 将全力进行攻击。 可以无视对手的特性效果。

menacing-moonraze-maelstrom.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的露奈雅拉 将全力进行攻击。 可以无视对手的特性效果。

lets-snuggle-forever.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
lets-snuggle-forever.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的谜拟Ｑ 将全力进行乱揍攻击。

splintered-stormshards.short_effect: Inflicts damage and removes any terrain present on the battlefield.
splintered-stormshards.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的鬃岩狼人 将全力进行攻击。 而且会消除场地状态。

clangorous-soulblaze.short_effect: Inflicts damage to all opposing Pokémon and increases the user’s Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
clangorous-soulblaze.short_effect_zh: 得到Ｚ力量的杖尾鳞甲龙 将全力攻击对手。 并且自己的能力会提高。

zippy-zap.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
zippy-zap.short_effect_zh: 迅猛无比的电击。 必定能够先制攻击， 击中对方的要害。

splishy-splash.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
splishy-splash.short_effect_zh: 往巨浪中注入电能后 冲撞对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。

floaty-fall.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
floaty-fall.short_effect_zh: 轻飘飘地浮起来后， 再猛地俯冲下去进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。

pika-papow.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
pika-papow.short_effect_zh: 皮卡丘越喜欢训练家， 电击的威力就越强。 攻击必定会命中。

bouncy-bubble.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
bouncy-bubble.short_effect_zh: 投掷水球进行攻击。 吸水后能回复等同于 造成的伤害一半的HP。

buzzy-buzz.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
buzzy-buzz.short_effect_zh: 放出电击攻击对手。 让对手陷入麻痹状态。

sizzly-slide.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
sizzly-slide.short_effect_zh: 用燃起大火的身体 猛烈地冲撞对手。 让对手陷入灼伤状态。

glitzy-glow.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
glitzy-glow.short_effect_zh: 利用念力强攻，粉碎对方信心。 制造一道能减弱对手 特殊攻击的神奇墙壁。

baddy-bad.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
baddy-bad.short_effect_zh: 恶行恶相地进行攻击。 制造一道能减弱对手 物理攻击的神奇墙壁。

sappy-seed.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
sappy-seed.short_effect_zh: 长出巨大的藤蔓， 播撒种子进行攻击。 种子每回合都会吸取对手的HP。

freezy-frost.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
freezy-frost.short_effect_zh: 利用冰冷的黑雾结晶进行攻击。 使全体宝可梦的能力变回原点。

sparkly-swirl.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
sparkly-swirl.short_effect_zh: 利用芬芳刺鼻的龙卷风吞噬对方。 能治愈我方宝可梦的异常状态。

veevee-volley.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
veevee-volley.short_effect_zh: 伊布越喜欢训练家， 冲撞的威力就越强。 攻击必定会命中。

double-iron-bash.short_effect_zh: 以胸口的螺帽为中心旋转， 并连续２次挥动手臂打击对手。 有时会使对手畏缩。

max-guard.short_effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
max-guard.short_effect_zh: 完全抵挡 对手的攻击。 连续使出则容易失败。

dynamax-cannon.short_effect: Sets Light Screen on the user’s side of the field after inflicting damage.
dynamax-cannon.short_effect_zh: 从核心放出光束进行攻击。 如果对手正处于极巨化状态， 则造成的伤害会变为２倍。

snipe-shot.short_effect: Sets Reflect on the user’s side of the field after inflicting damage.
snipe-shot.short_effect_zh: 能无视具有吸引对手招式效果的 特性或招式的影响。 可以向选定的对手进行攻击。

jaw-lock.short_effect: Seeds the target after inflicting damage.
jaw-lock.short_effect_zh: 使双方直到一方濒死为止 无法替换宝可梦。 其中一方退场则可以解除效果。

stuff-cheeks.short_effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects after inflicting damage.
stuff-cheeks.short_effect_zh: 吃掉携带的树果， 大幅提高防御。

no-retreat.short_effect: Hits twice in one turn, with a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.
no-retreat.short_effect_zh: 提高自己的所有能力， 但无法替换或逃走。

tar-shot.short_effect: The user pours sticky tar over the target, lowering the target’s Speed stat. The target becomes weaker to Fire-type moves.
tar-shot.short_effect_zh: 泼洒黏糊糊的沥青， 降低对手的速度， 并且使对手的弱点变为火。

magic-powder.short_effect: The user scatters a cloud of magic powder that changes the target to Psychic type.
magic-powder.short_effect_zh: 向对手喷洒魔法粉， 使对手变为超能力属性。

dragon-darts.short_effect: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two targets, this move hits each target once.
dragon-darts.short_effect_zh: 让多龙梅西亚进行２次攻击。 如果对手有２只宝可梦， 则对它们各进行１次攻击。

teatime.short_effect: The user has teatime with all the Pokémon in the battle. Each Pokémon eats its held Berry.
teatime.short_effect_zh: 举办一场茶会， 场上的所有宝可梦都会 吃掉自己携带的树果。

octolock.short_effect: The user locks the target in and prevents it from fleeing. This move also lowers the target’s Defense and Sp. Def every turn.
octolock.short_effect_zh: 让对手无法逃走。 对手被固定后， 每回合都会降低防御和特防。

bolt-beak.short_effect: The user stabs the target with its electrified beak. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.
bolt-beak.short_effect_zh: 用带电的喙啄刺对手。 如果比对手先出手攻击， 招式的威力会变成２倍。

fishious-rend.short_effect: The user rends the target with its hard gills. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.
fishious-rend.short_effect_zh: 用坚硬的腮咬住对手。 如果比对手先出手攻击， 招式的威力会变成２倍。

court-change.short_effect: With its mysterious power, the user swaps the effects on either side of the field.
court-change.short_effect_zh: 用神奇的力量 交换双方的场地效果。

max-flare.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-flare.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的火属性攻击。 可在５回合内让日照变得强烈。

max-flutterby.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-flutterby.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的虫属性攻击。 会降低对手的特攻。

max-lightning.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-lightning.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的电属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成电气场地。

max-strike.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-strike.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的一般属性攻击。 会降低对手的速度。

max-knuckle.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-knuckle.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的格斗属性攻击。 会提高我方的攻击。

max-phantasm.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-phantasm.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的幽灵属性攻击。 会降低对手的防御。

max-hailstorm.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-hailstorm.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦 才能使出的冰属性攻击。 在５回合内会降下冰雹。

max-ooze.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-ooze.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的毒属性攻击。 会提高我方的特攻。

max-geyser.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-geyser.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的水属性攻击。 可在５回合内降下大雨。

max-airstream.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-airstream.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的飞行属性攻击。 会提高我方的速度。

max-starfall.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-starfall.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的妖精属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成薄雾场地。

max-wyrmwind.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-wyrmwind.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的龙属性攻击。 会降低对手的攻击。

max-mindstorm.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-mindstorm.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的超能力属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成精神场地。

max-rockfall.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-rockfall.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的岩石属性攻击。 可在５回合内卷起沙暴。

max-quake.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-quake.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的地面属性攻击。 会提高我方的特防。

max-darkness.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-darkness.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的恶属性攻击。 会降低对手的特防。

max-overgrowth.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-overgrowth.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的草属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成青草场地。

max-steelspike.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
max-steelspike.short_effect_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的钢属性攻击。 会提高我方的防御。

clangorous-soul.short_effect: The user raises all its stats by using some of its HP.
clangorous-soul.short_effect_zh: 削减少许自己的ＨＰ， 使所有能力都提高。

body-press.short_effect: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user’s Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.
body-press.short_effect_zh: 用身体撞向对手进行攻击。 防御越高， 给予的伤害就越高。

decorate.short_effect: The user sharply raises the target’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats by decorating the target.
decorate.short_effect_zh: 通过装饰， 大幅提高对方的 攻击和特攻。

drum-beating.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
drum-beating.short_effect_zh: 用鼓点来控制 鼓的根部进行攻击， 从而降低对手的速度。

snap-trap.short_effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
snap-trap.short_effect_zh: 使用捕兽夹， 在４～５回合内， 夹住对手进行攻击。

pyro-ball.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
pyro-ball.short_effect_zh: 点燃小石子，形成火球攻击对手。 有时会使对手陷入灼伤状态。

behemoth-blade.short_effect: The user becomes a gigantic sword and cuts the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.
behemoth-blade.short_effect_zh: 变身为巨大的剑，挥斩对手。 如果对手正处于极巨化状态， 则造成的伤害会变为２倍。

behemoth-bash.short_effect: The user becomes a gigantic shield and slams into the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.
behemoth-bash.short_effect_zh: 变身为巨大的盾，撞击对手。 如果对手正处于极巨化状态， 则造成的伤害会变为２倍。

aura-wheel.short_effect: Morpeko attacks and raises its Speed with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move’s type changes depending on the user’s form.
aura-wheel.short_effect_zh: 用储存在颊囊里的能量 进行攻击，并提高自己的速度。 其属性会随着莫鲁贝可的样子而改变。

breaking-swipe.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
breaking-swipe.short_effect_zh: 用坚韧的尾巴 猛扫对手进行攻击， 从而降低对手的攻击。

branch-poke.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
branch-poke.short_effect_zh: 使用尖锐的树枝 刺向对手进行攻击。

overdrive.short_effect: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.
overdrive.short_effect_zh: 奏响吉他和贝斯，释放出 发出巨响的剧烈震动 攻击对手。

apple-acid.short_effect: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat.
apple-acid.short_effect_zh: 使用从酸苹果中提取出来的 酸性液体进行攻击。 降低对手的特防。

grav-apple.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
grav-apple.short_effect_zh: 从高处落下苹果， 给予对手伤害。 可降低对手的防御。

spirit-break.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
spirit-break.short_effect_zh: 用足以让对手一蹶不振的 气势进行攻击。 会降低对手的特攻。

strange-steam.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.
strange-steam.short_effect_zh: 喷出烟雾攻击对手。 有时会使对手混乱。

life-dew.short_effect: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon in the battle.
life-dew.short_effect_zh: 喷洒出神奇的水， 回复自己和场上同伴的ＨＰ。

obstruct.short_effect: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession. Direct contact harshly lowers the attacker’s Defense stat.
obstruct.short_effect_zh: 完全抵挡对手的攻击。 连续使出则容易失败。 一旦触碰，防御就会大幅降低。

false-surrender.short_effect_zh: 装作低头认错的样子， 用凌乱的头发进行突刺。 攻击必定会命中。

meteor-assault.short_effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
meteor-assault.short_effect_zh: 大力挥舞粗壮的茎进行攻击。 但同时自己也会被晃晕， 下一回合自己将无法动弹。

eternabeam.short_effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
eternabeam.short_effect_zh: 无极汰那变回原来的样子后， 发动的最强攻击。 下一回合自己将无法动弹。

steel-beam.short_effect: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.
steel-beam.short_effect_zh: 将从全身聚集的钢铁 化为光束，激烈地发射出去。 自己也会受到伤害。

expanding-force.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
expanding-force.short_effect_zh: 利用精神力量攻击对手。 在精神场地上威力会有所提高， 能对所有对手造成伤害。

steel-roller.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
steel-roller.short_effect_zh: 在破坏场地的同时攻击对手。 如果脚下没有任何场地状态存在， 使出此招式时便会失败。

scale-shot.short_effect: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.
scale-shot.short_effect_zh: 发射鳞片进行攻击。 连续攻击２～５次。 速度会提高但防御会降低。

meteor-beam.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
meteor-beam.short_effect_zh: 第１回合聚集宇宙之力提高特攻， 第２回合攻击对手。

shell-side-arm.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
shell-side-arm.short_effect_zh: 从物理攻击和特殊攻击中选择 可造成较多伤害的方式进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入中毒状态。

misty-explosion.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
misty-explosion.short_effect_zh: 对自己周围的所有宝可梦进行攻击， 但使出后，自己会陷入濒死。 在薄雾场地上，招式威力会提高。

grassy-glide.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
grassy-glide.short_effect_zh: 仿佛在地面上滑行般地攻击对手。 在青草场地上， 必定能够先制攻击。

rising-voltage.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
rising-voltage.short_effect_zh: 用从地面升腾而起的电击进行攻击。 当对手处于电气场地上时， 招式威力会变成２倍。

terrain-pulse.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
terrain-pulse.short_effect_zh: 借助场地的力量进行攻击。 视使出招式时场地状态不同， 招式的属性和威力会有所变化。

skitter-smack.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
skitter-smack.short_effect_zh: 从对手背后爬近后进行攻击。 会降低对手的特攻。

burning-jealousy.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
burning-jealousy.short_effect_zh: 用嫉妒的能量攻击对手。 会让在该回合内能力有所提高的 宝可梦陷入灼伤状态。

lash-out.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
lash-out.short_effect_zh: 攻击对手以发泄对其感到的恼怒情绪。 如果在该回合内自身能力遭到降低， 招式的威力会变成２倍。

poltergeist.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
poltergeist.short_effect_zh: 操纵对手的持有物进行攻击。 当对手没有携带道具时， 使出此招式时便会失败。

corrosive-gas.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
corrosive-gas.short_effect_zh: 用具有强酸性的气体 包裹住自己周围所有的宝可梦， 并融化其所携带的道具。

coaching.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
coaching.short_effect_zh: 通过进行正确合理的指导， 提高我方全员的攻击和防御。

flip-turn.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
flip-turn.short_effect_zh: 在攻击之后急速返回， 和后备宝可梦进行替换。

triple-axel.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
triple-axel.short_effect_zh: 连续３次踢对手进行攻击。 每踢中一次，威力就会提高。

dual-wingbeat.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dual-wingbeat.short_effect_zh: 将翅膀撞向对手进行攻击。 连续２次给予伤害。

scorching-sands.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.
scorching-sands.short_effect_zh: 将滚烫的沙子砸向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。

jungle-healing.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
jungle-healing.short_effect_zh: 与丛林融为一体， 回复自己和场上同伴的ＨＰ和状态。

wicked-blow.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
wicked-blow.short_effect_zh: 将恶之流派修炼至大成的 猛烈一击。 必定会击中要害。

surging-strikes.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
surging-strikes.short_effect_zh: 将水之流派修炼至大成的 仿若行云流水般的３次连击。 必定会击中要害。

thunder-cage.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
thunder-cage.short_effect_zh: 将对手困在 电流四溅的囚笼中， 在４～５回合内进行攻击。

dragon-energy.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
dragon-energy.short_effect_zh: 把生命力转换为力量攻击对手。 自己的ＨＰ越少，招式的威力越小。

freezing-glare.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
freezing-glare.short_effect_zh: 从双眼发射精神力量进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入冰冻状态。

fiery-wrath.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
fiery-wrath.short_effect_zh: 将愤怒转化为火焰般的气场进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。

thunderous-kick.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
thunderous-kick.short_effect_zh: 以雷电般的动作 戏耍对手的同时使出脚踢。 可降低对手的防御。

glacial-lance.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
glacial-lance.short_effect_zh: 向对手投掷 掀起暴风雪的冰矛进行攻击。

astral-barrage.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
astral-barrage.short_effect_zh: 用大量的小灵体向 对手发起攻击。

eerie-spell.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
eerie-spell.short_effect_zh: 用强大的精神力量攻击。 让对手最后使用的招式 减少３ＰＰ。

dire-claw.short_effect: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws, aiming to land a critical hit. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or drowsy.

psyshield-bash.short_effect: Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This may also raise the user’s defensive stats.

power-shift.short_effect: The user swaps its offensive and defensive stats.

stone-axe.short_effect: The user swings its stone axes at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Stone splinters left behind by this attack continue to damage the target for several turns.

springtide-storm.short_effect: The user attacks by wrapping the target in fierce winds brimming with love and hate. This move’s additional effects depend on the user’s form.

mystical-power.short_effect: The user strengthens itself with a mysterious power. If it excels in offense, its offensive stats are raised. If it excels in defense, its defensive stats are raised.

raging-fury.short_effect: The user rampages and spews vicious flames to inflict damage on the target, then becomes fixated on using this move.

wave-crash.short_effect: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user and raises the user’s action speed.

chloroblast.short_effect: The user launches its amassed chlorophyll to inflict damage on the target. This also damages the user and lowers the user's action speed.

mountain-gale.short_effect: The user hurls giant chunks of ice at the target to inflict damage.

victory-dance.short_effect: The user performs a dance to usher in victory. This raises the user’s offensive and defensive stats and increases the damage dealt by the user’s moves by 50 percent.

headlong-rush.short_effect: The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s defensive stats.

barb-barrage.short_effect: The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

esper-wing.short_effect: The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also raises the user's action speed. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

bitter-malice.short_effect: The user attacks its target with spine-chilling resentment. This may also leave the target with frostbite. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

shelter.short_effect: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, raising its defensive stats. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss.

triple-arrows.short_effect: The user delivers an axe kick, then fires three arrows. This raises the chance of its future attacks landing critical hits and also lowers the target's defensive stats.

infernal-parade.short_effect: The user attacks with myriad fireballs. This may also leave the target with a burn. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

ceaseless-edge.short_effect: The user slashes its shell blade at the target, aiming to land a critical hit. Shell splinters left behind by this attack will continue to damage the target for several turns.

bleakwind-storm.short_effect: The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also leave the target with frostbite.

wildbolt-storm.short_effect: The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

sandsear-storm.short_effect: The user attacks by wrapping the target in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This also leaves the target with a burn.

lunar-blessing.short_effect: The user heals its own status conditions and restores its HP. Incoming moves also become more likely to miss.

take-heart.short_effect: The user lifts its spirits, healing its own status conditions and raising its offensive and defensive stats.

tera-blast.short_effect: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

silk-trap.short_effect: The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

axe-kick.short_effect: The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.

last-respects.short_effect: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

lumina-crash.short_effect: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

order-up.short_effect: The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.

jet-punch.short_effect: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

spicy-extract.short_effect: The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.

spin-out.short_effect: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

population-bomb.short_effect: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

ice-spinner.short_effect: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

glaive-rush.short_effect: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

revival-blessing.short_effect: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

salt-cure.short_effect: The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.

triple-dive.short_effect: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

mortal-spin.short_effect: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

doodle.short_effect: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

fillet-away.short_effect: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

kowtow-cleave.short_effect: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

flower-trick.short_effect: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

torch-song.short_effect: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

aqua-step.short_effect: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

raging-bull.short_effect: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

make-it-rain.short_effect: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

psyblade.short_effect: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

hydro-steam.short_effect: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

ruination.short_effect: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

collision-course.short_effect: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

electro-drift.short_effect: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

shed-tail.short_effect: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

chilly-reception.short_effect: The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.

tidy-up.short_effect: The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

snowscape.short_effect: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

pounce.short_effect: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

trailblaze.short_effect: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

chilling-water.short_effect: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

hyper-drill.short_effect: The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

twin-beam.short_effect: The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

rage-fist.short_effect: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.

armor-cannon.short_effect: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

bitter-blade.short_effect: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

double-shock.short_effect: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

gigaton-hammer.short_effect: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

comeuppance.short_effect: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

aqua-cutter.short_effect: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

blood-moon.short_effect: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.

matcha-gotcha.short_effect: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

syrup-bomb.short_effect: The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

ivy-cudgel.short_effect: The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

electro-shot.short_effect: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.

tera-starstorm.short_effect: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

fickle-beam.short_effect: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

burning-bulwark.short_effect: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

thunderclap.short_effect: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

mighty-cleave.short_effect: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

tachyon-cutter.short_effect: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

hard-press.short_effect: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

dragon-cheer.short_effect: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

alluring-voice.short_effect: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

temper-flare.short_effect: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

supercell-slam.short_effect: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

psychic-noise.short_effect: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

upper-hand.short_effect: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

malignant-chain.short_effect: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

shadow-rush.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit in Hyper Mode.

shadow-blast.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

shadow-blitz.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-bolt.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

shadow-break.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-chill.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.

shadow-end.short_effect: User receives 1/2 its HP in recoil.

shadow-fire.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

shadow-rave.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-storm.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-wave.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-down.short_effect: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

shadow-half.short_effect: Halves HP of all Pokémon on the field.  Must recharge

shadow-hold.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

shadow-mist.short_effect: Lowers the target’s evasion by two stages.

shadow-shed.short_effect: Removes Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.

shadow-sky.short_effect: Changes the weather to Shadow Sky for five turns.

master-ball.short_effect: Catches a wild Pokémon every time.
master-ball.short_effect_zh: 必定能捉到野生宝可梦的， 性能最好的球。

ultra-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 2×.
ultra-ball.short_effect_zh: 比起超级球来 更容易捉到宝可梦的， 性能非常不错的球。

great-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 1.5×.
great-ball.short_effect_zh: 比起精灵球来 更容易捉到宝可梦的， 性能还算不错的球。

poke-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.
poke-ball.short_effect_zh: 用于投向野生宝可梦 并将其捕捉的球。 它是胶囊样式的。

safari-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon in the Great Marsh or Safari Zone.  Success rate is 1.5×.
safari-ball.short_effect_zh: 仅能在大湿地中使用的特殊的球。 上面有迷彩花纹。

net-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3× for water and bug Pokémon.
net-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 能很容易地捕捉 水属性和虫属性的宝可梦。

dive-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate is 3.5× when underwater, fishing, or surfing.
dive-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 能很容易地捕捉 生活在水世界里的宝可梦。

nest-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.9× for level 1 Pokémon, and drops steadily to 1× at level 30.
nest-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 捕捉的野生宝可梦越弱， 就会越容易捕捉。

repeat-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3× for previously-caught Pokémon.
repeat-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 能很容易地捕捉 以前曾捉到过的宝可梦。

timer-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate increases by 0.1× (Gen V: 0.3×) every turn, to a max of 4×.
timer-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 回合数花费得越多， 宝可梦就会越容易捕捉。

luxury-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Caught Pokémon start with 200 happiness.
luxury-ball.short_effect_zh: 住着十分惬意的球。 捉到的野生宝可梦会 变得容易和训练家亲密。

premier-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.
premier-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点珍贵的球。 特制出来的某种纪念品。

dusk-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Success rate is 3.5× at night and in caves.
dusk-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 能很容易地在夜晚或洞窟等 阴暗的地方捕捉宝可梦。

heal-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.  Caught Pokémon are immediately healed.
heal-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点温柔的球。 能回复捉到的宝可梦的 ＨＰ并治愈异常状态。

quick-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon. Success rate is 4× (Gen V: 5×), but only on the first turn.
quick-ball.short_effect_zh: 有点与众不同的球。 如果战斗开始后立刻使用， 就能很容易地捉到宝可梦。

cherish-ball.short_effect: Tries to catch a wild Pokémon.
cherish-ball.short_effect_zh: 相当珍贵的球。 特制出来的某种纪念品。

potion.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式伤药。 能让１只宝可梦 回复２０ＨＰ。

antidote.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式药水。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 中毒状态。

burn-heal.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式药水。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 灼伤状态。

ice-heal.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式药水。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 冰冻状态。

awakening.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式药水。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 睡眠状态。

paralyze-heal.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式药水。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 麻痹状态。

full-restore.short_effect: Restores HP to full and cures any status ailment and confusion.
full-restore.short_effect_zh: 能回复１只宝可梦的 所有ＨＰ并治愈所有异常状态。

max-potion.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式伤药。 能让１只宝可梦 回复所有ＨＰ。

hyper-potion.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式伤药。 能让１只宝可梦 回复１２０ＨＰ。

super-potion.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式伤药。 能让１只宝可梦 回复６０ＨＰ。

full-heal.short_effect: Cures any status ailment and confusion.
full-heal.short_effect_zh: 喷雾式药水。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 所有异常状态。

revive.short_effect_zh: 能让１只陷入濒死的 宝可梦重获生机， 并回复一半ＨＰ。

max-revive.short_effect_zh: 能让１只陷入濒死的 宝可梦重获生机， 并回复所有ＨＰ。

fresh-water.short_effect_zh: 富含矿物质的水。 能让１只宝可梦 回复３０ＨＰ。

soda-pop.short_effect_zh: 翻腾着气泡的汽水。 能让１只宝可梦 回复５０ＨＰ。

lemonade.short_effect_zh: 非常香甜的牛奶。 能让１只宝可梦 回复７０ＨＰ。

moomoo-milk.short_effect_zh: 营养百分百的牛奶。 能让１只宝可梦 回复１００ＨＰ。

energy-powder.short_effect_zh: 非常苦的药粉。 能让１只宝可梦 回复６０ＨＰ。

energy-root.short_effect_zh: 非常苦的根。 能让１只宝可梦 回复１２０ＨＰ。

heal-powder.short_effect: Cures any status ailment, but lowers happiness.
heal-powder.short_effect_zh: 非常苦的药粉。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 所有异常状态。

revival-herb.short_effect: Revives with full HP, but lowers happiness.
revival-herb.short_effect_zh: 非常苦的药草。 能让１只濒死的宝可梦 回复所有ＨＰ。

ether.short_effect_zh: 能让宝可梦学会的 其中１个招式 回复１０ＰＰ。

max-ether.short_effect: Restores PP to full for one move.
max-ether.short_effect_zh: 能让宝可梦学会的 其中１个招式 回复所有ＰＰ。

elixir.short_effect_zh: 能让宝可梦学会的 ４个招式各 回复１０ＰＰ。

max-elixir.short_effect: Restores PP to full for each move.
max-elixir.short_effect_zh: 能让宝可梦学会的 ４个招式 回复所有ＰＰ。

lava-cookie.short_effect: Cures any status ailment and confusion.
lava-cookie.short_effect_zh: 釜炎特产的仙贝。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 所有异常状态。

berry-juice.short_effect_zh: １００％树果果汁。 能让１只宝可梦 回复２０ＨＰ。

sacred-ash.short_effect: Revives all fainted Pokémon with full HP.
sacred-ash.short_effect_zh: 能让陷入濒死的 全部宝可梦 回复所有ＨＰ。

hp-up.short_effect_zh: 宝可梦的营养饮料。 能提高１只宝可梦的 ＨＰ的基础点数。

protein.short_effect_zh: 宝可梦的营养饮料。 能提高１只宝可梦的 攻击的基础点数。

iron.short_effect_zh: 宝可梦的营养饮料。 能提高１只宝可梦的 防御的基础点数。

carbos.short_effect_zh: 宝可梦的营养饮料。 能提高１只宝可梦的 速度的基础点数。

calcium.short_effect: Raises Special Attack effort and happiness.
calcium.short_effect_zh: 宝可梦的营养饮料。 能提高１只宝可梦的 特攻的基础点数。

rare-candy.short_effect: Causes a level-up and raises happiness.
rare-candy.short_effect_zh: 充满能量的糖果。 将它交给宝可梦后， １只宝可梦的等级仅会提高１。

pp-up.short_effect: Raises a move’s max PP by 20%.
pp-up.short_effect_zh: 能让宝可梦学会的 其中１个招式的 ＰＰ最大值少量提高。

zinc.short_effect_zh: 宝可梦的营养饮料。 能提高１只宝可梦的 特防的基础点数。

pp-max.short_effect: Raises a move’s max PP by 60%.
pp-max.short_effect_zh: 能将宝可梦学会的 其中１个招式的 ＰＰ最大值提至最高。

old-gateau.short_effect: Cures any status ailment and confusion.
old-gateau.short_effect_zh: 百代不为人知的特产。 能治愈１只宝可梦的 所有异常状态。

guard-spec.short_effect: Prevents stat changes in battle for five turns in battle.  Raises happiness.
guard-spec.short_effect_zh: 在战斗中， ５回合内不让我方 能力降低的道具。

dire-hit.short_effect: Increases the chance of a critical hit in battle.  Raises happiness.
dire-hit.short_effect_zh: 击中要害的几率会大幅提高。 只能使用１次。 离场后，效果便会消失。

x-attack.short_effect: Raises Attack by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.
x-attack.short_effect_zh: 大幅提高战斗中 宝可梦攻击的道具。 离场后，效果便会消失。

x-defense.short_effect: Raises Defense by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.
x-defense.short_effect_zh: 大幅提高战斗中 宝可梦防御的道具。 离场后，效果便会消失。

x-speed.short_effect: Raises Speed by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.
x-speed.short_effect_zh: 大幅提高战斗中 宝可梦速度的道具。 离场后，效果便会消失。

x-accuracy.short_effect: Raises accuracy by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.
x-accuracy.short_effect_zh: 大幅提高战斗中 宝可梦命中的道具。 离场后，效果便会消失。

x-sp-atk.short_effect: Raises Special Attack by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.
x-sp-atk.short_effect_zh: 大幅提高战斗中 宝可梦特攻的道具。 离场后，效果便会消失。

x-sp-def.short_effect: Raises Special Defense by one stage in battle.  Raises happiness.
x-sp-def.short_effect_zh: 大幅提高战斗中 宝可梦特防的道具。 离场后，效果便会消失。

poke-doll.short_effect_zh: 能吸引宝可梦注意的道具。 在和野生宝可梦的 战斗中绝对可以逃走。

fluffy-tail.short_effect_zh: 能吸引宝可梦注意的道具。 在和野生宝可梦的 战斗中绝对可以逃走。

blue-flute.short_effect_zh: 以蓝色玻璃制成的哨子。 可以治愈睡眠状态。

yellow-flute.short_effect_zh: 以黄色玻璃制成的哨子。 可以治愈混乱状态。

red-flute.short_effect_zh: 以红色玻璃制成的哨子。 可以治愈着迷状态。

black-flute.short_effect: Halves the wild Pokémon encounter rate.
black-flute.short_effect_zh: 以黑色玻璃制成的哨子。 在使用的地方更容易 遇到强大的宝可梦。

white-flute.short_effect: Doubles the wild Pokémon encounter rate.
white-flute.short_effect_zh: 以白色玻璃制成的哨子。 在使用的地方更容易 遇到弱小的宝可梦。

shoal-salt.short_effect: No effect. Gen III: Trade four and four Shoal Shells for a Shell Bell.
shoal-salt.short_effect_zh: 在浅滩洞穴这地方 找到的海盐。

shoal-shell.short_effect: No effect. Gen III: Trade four and four Shoal Salts for a Shell Bell.
shoal-shell.short_effect_zh: 在浅滩洞穴这地方 找到的贝壳。

red-shard.short_effect: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
red-shard.short_effect_zh: 红色的小碎片。 好像是以前制作的 某道具的一部分。

blue-shard.short_effect: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
blue-shard.short_effect_zh: 蓝色的小碎片。 好像是以前制作的 某道具的一部分。

yellow-shard.short_effect: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
yellow-shard.short_effect_zh: 黄色的小碎片。 好像是以前制作的 某道具的一部分。

green-shard.short_effect: No effect. Can be traded for items or moves.
green-shard.short_effect_zh: 绿色的小碎片。 好像是以前制作的 某道具的一部分。

super-repel.short_effect: For 200 steps, prevents wild encounters of level lower than your party’s lead Pokémon.
super-repel.short_effect_zh: 弱小的野生宝可梦 将完全不会出现。 效果比除虫喷雾更持久。

max-repel.short_effect: For 250 steps, prevents wild encounters of level lower than your party’s lead Pokémon.
max-repel.short_effect_zh: 弱小的野生宝可梦 将完全不会出现。 效果比白银喷雾更持久。

escape-rope.short_effect: Transports user to the outside entrance of a cave.
escape-rope.short_effect_zh: 结实的长绳。 可以从洞窟或迷宫中脱身。

repel.short_effect: For 100 steps, prevents wild encounters of level lower than your party’s lead Pokémon.
repel.short_effect_zh: 使用后，在较短的一段时间内， 弱小的野生宝可梦将完全不会出现。

sun-stone.short_effect: Evolves a Cottonee into Whimsicott, a Gloom into Bellossom, a Petilil into Lilligant, or a Sunkern into Sunflora.
sun-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 像太阳一样赤红。

moon-stone.short_effect: Evolves a Clefairy into Clefable, a Jigglypuff into Wigglytuff, a Munna into Musharna, a Nidorina into Nidoqueen, a Nidorino into Nidoking, or a Skitty into Delcatty.
moon-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 像夜空一样乌黑。

fire-stone.short_effect: Evolves an Eevee into Flareon, a Growlithe into Arcanine, a Pansear into Simisear, or a Vulpix into Ninetales.
fire-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 看上去是橙黄色的。

thunder-stone.short_effect: Evolves an Eelektrik into Eelektross, an Eevee into Jolteon, or a Pikachu into Raichu.
thunder-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 有着闪电般的花纹。

water-stone.short_effect: Evolves an Eevee into Vaporeon, a Lombre into Ludicolo, a Panpour into Simipour, a Poliwhirl into Poliwrath, a Shellder into Cloyster, or a Staryu into Starmie.
water-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 看上去是澄蓝色的。

leaf-stone.short_effect: Evolves an Exeggcute into Exeggutor, a Gloom into Vileplume, a Nuzleaf into Shiftry, a Pansage into Simisage, or a Weepinbell into Victreebel.
leaf-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 有着叶子般的花纹。

tiny-mushroom.short_effect: Fire Red and Leaf Green: Trade two for prior Level-up moves. Sell for 250 Pokédollars, or to Hungry Maid for 500 Pokédollars.
tiny-mushroom.short_effect_zh: 珍稀的小蘑菇。 在一些爱好者中 有着相当高的人气。

big-mushroom.short_effect: Fire Red and Leaf Green: Trade for prior Level-up moves. Sell for 2500 Pokédollars, or to Hungry Maid for 5000 Pokédollars.
big-mushroom.short_effect_zh: 珍稀的大蘑菇。 在一些爱好者中 有着非常高的人气。

pearl.short_effect: Sell for 700 Pokédollars, or to Ore Collector for 1400 Pokédollars.
pearl.short_effect_zh: 散发着美丽银辉 且有点小的珍珠。 可以在商店低价出售。

big-pearl.short_effect: Sell for 3750 Pokédollars, or to Ore Collector for 7500 Pokédollars.
big-pearl.short_effect_zh: 散发着美丽银辉 且相当大颗的珍珠。 可以在商店高价出售。

stardust.short_effect: Sell for 1000 Pokédollars, or to Ore Collector for 2000 Pokédollars.
stardust.short_effect_zh: 手感细腻且十分 美丽的红色沙子。 可以在商店低价出售。

star-piece.short_effect: Platinum: Trade for one of each color Shard. Black and White: Trade for PP Up. Sell for 4900 Pokédollars, or to Ore Collector for 9800 Pokédollars.
star-piece.short_effect_zh: 闪着红光且十分 美丽的宝石碎片。 可以在商店高价出售。

nugget.short_effect: Sell for 5000 Pokédollars, or to Ore Collector for 10000 Pokédollars.
nugget.short_effect_zh: 闪着金光， 以纯金制成的珠子。 可以在商店高价出售。

heart-scale.short_effect: No effect. Can be traded for prior Level-up moves.
heart-scale.short_effect_zh: 有着美丽心形外形 且非常珍稀的鳞片。 有些人收到会很高兴。

honey.short_effect_zh: 在草丛或洞窟等地方使用后， 被甜甜香气吸引的 野生宝可梦就会出现。

growth-mulch.short_effect: Growing time of berries is reduced, but the soil dries out faster.
growth-mulch.short_effect_zh: 培育树果时的肥料。 但完全不适合丰缘地区的土壤， 所以没什么效果。

damp-mulch.short_effect: Growing time of berries is increased, but the soil dries out slower.
damp-mulch.short_effect_zh: 培育树果时的肥料。 但完全不适合丰缘地区的土壤， 所以没什么效果。

stable-mulch.short_effect: Berries stay on the plant for longer than their usual time.
stable-mulch.short_effect_zh: 培育树果时的肥料。 但完全不适合丰缘地区的土壤， 所以没什么效果。

gooey-mulch.short_effect: Berries regrow from dead plants an increased number of times.
gooey-mulch.short_effect_zh: 培育树果时的肥料。 但完全不适合丰缘地区的土壤， 所以没什么效果。

root-fossil.short_effect: Can be revived into a Lileep.
root-fossil.short_effect_zh: 很久以前栖息在海里的 古代宝可梦的化石。 好像是根的一部分。

claw-fossil.short_effect: Can be revived into an Anorith.
claw-fossil.short_effect_zh: 很久以前栖息在海里的 古代宝可梦的化石。 好像是爪子的一部分。

helix-fossil.short_effect: Can be revived into an Omanyte.
helix-fossil.short_effect_zh: 很久以前栖息在海里的 古代宝可梦的化石。 好像是贝壳的一部分。

dome-fossil.short_effect: Can be revived into a Kabuto.
dome-fossil.short_effect_zh: 很久以前栖息在海里的 古代宝可梦的化石。 好像是甲壳的一部分。

old-amber.short_effect: Can be revived into an Aerodactyl.
old-amber.short_effect_zh: 封存着古代宝可梦 遗传基因的琥珀， 透着点红色。

armor-fossil.short_effect: Can be revived into a Shieldon.
armor-fossil.short_effect_zh: 很久以前生活在地上的 古代宝可梦的化石。 好像是领饰的一部分。

skull-fossil.short_effect: Can be revived into a Cranidos.
skull-fossil.short_effect_zh: 很久以前生活在地上的 古代宝可梦的化石。 好像是头部的一部分。

rare-bone.short_effect: Sell for 5000 Pokédollars, or to Bone Man for 10000 Pokédollars.
rare-bone.short_effect_zh: 在宝可梦考古学上 非常贵重的骨头。 可以在商店高价出售。

shiny-stone.short_effect: Evolves a Minccino into Cinccino, a Roselia into Roserade, or a Togetic into Togekiss.
shiny-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 像光芒一样耀眼。

dusk-stone.short_effect: Evolves a Lampent into Chandelure, a Misdreavus into Mismagius, or a Murkrow into Honchkrow.
dusk-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 像黑夜一般漆黑。

dawn-stone.short_effect: Evolves a male Kirlia into Gallade or a female Snorunt into Froslass.
dawn-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 像眼眸一般光彩动人。

oval-stone.short_effect: Level-up during Day on a Happiny: Holder evolves into Chansey.
oval-stone.short_effect_zh: 能让某些特定宝可梦 进化的神奇石头。 像珠子一般圆润。

odd-keystone.short_effect: Use on the tower on Route 209 to encounter Spiritomb if you have at least 32 Underground greetings.
odd-keystone.short_effect_zh: 没有它，石之塔就会 崩塌的重要石头。 有时能从石头里听到声音。

adamant-orb.short_effect: Boosts the damage from Dialga’s Dragon-type and Steel-type moves by 20%.
adamant-orb.short_effect_zh: 让帝牙卢卡携带的话， 龙和钢属性的招式威力就会提高。 散发着光辉的宝珠。

lustrous-orb.short_effect: Boosts the damage from Palkia’s Dragon-type and Water-type moves by 20%.
lustrous-orb.short_effect_zh: 让帕路奇亚携带的话， 龙和水属性的招式威力就会提高。 散发着美丽光辉的宝珠。

grass-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

flame-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

bubble-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

bloom-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

tunnel-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

steel-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

heart-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

snow-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

space-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

air-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

mosaic-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

brick-mail.short_effect: Lets a Trainer write a message and send it via Pokémon trade.

cheri-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when paralyzed to cure paralysis.
cheri-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈麻痹。

chesto-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when asleep to cure sleep.
chesto-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈睡眠。

pecha-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when poisoned to cure poison.
pecha-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈中毒。

rawst-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when burned to cure a burn.
rawst-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈灼伤。

aspear-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when frozen to cure frozen.
aspear-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈冰冻。

leppa-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when a move runs out of PP to restore its PP by 10.
leppa-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以回复１０ＰＰ。

oran-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to recover 10 HP.
oran-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以回复１０ＨＰ。

persim-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed when confused to cure confusion.
persim-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈混乱。

lum-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed to cure any status condition or confusion.
lum-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以治愈所有异常状态。

sitrus-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to recover 1/4 max HP.
sitrus-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 可以回复少量ＨＰ。

figy-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike spicy flavor.
figy-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 危机时可以回复ＨＰ。 如果讨厌这味道就会混乱。

wiki-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike dry flavor.
wiki-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 危机时可以回复ＨＰ。 如果讨厌这味道就会混乱。

mago-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike sweet flavor.
mago-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 危机时可以回复ＨＰ。 如果讨厌这味道就会混乱。

aguav-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike bitter flavor.
aguav-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 危机时可以回复ＨＰ。 如果讨厌这味道就会混乱。

iapapa-berry.short_effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike sour flavor.
iapapa-berry.short_effect_zh: 让宝可梦携带后， 危机时可以回复ＨＰ。 如果讨厌这味道就会混乱。

razz-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
razz-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨帅气。 红色的果实尝起来是辣的。

bluk-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
bluk-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨美丽。 蓝色的果实尝起来是涩的。

nanab-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
nanab-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨可爱。 粉红色的果实尝起来是甜的。

wepear-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
wepear-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨聪明。 绿色的果实尝起来是苦的。

pinap-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
pinap-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨强壮。 黄色的果实尝起来是酸的。

pomeg-berry.short_effect: Drops HP Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
pomeg-berry.short_effect_zh: 如果把它交给宝可梦， 宝可梦就会变得非常容易和训练家亲密， 但ＨＰ的基础点数会降低。

kelpsy-berry.short_effect: Drops Attack Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
kelpsy-berry.short_effect_zh: 如果把它交给宝可梦， 宝可梦就会变得非常容易和训练家亲密， 但攻击的基础点数会降低。

qualot-berry.short_effect: Drops Defense Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
qualot-berry.short_effect_zh: 如果把它交给宝可梦， 宝可梦就会变得非常容易和训练家亲密， 但防御的基础点数会降低。

hondew-berry.short_effect: Drops Special Attack Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
hondew-berry.short_effect_zh: 如果把它交给宝可梦， 宝可梦就会变得非常容易和训练家亲密， 但特攻的基础点数会降低。

grepa-berry.short_effect: Drops Special Defense Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
grepa-berry.short_effect_zh: 如果把它交给宝可梦， 宝可梦就会变得非常容易和训练家亲密， 但特防的基础点数会降低。

tamato-berry.short_effect: Drops Speed Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
tamato-berry.short_effect_zh: 如果把它交给宝可梦， 宝可梦就会变得非常容易和训练家亲密， 但速度的基础点数会降低。

cornn-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
cornn-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨美丽。 在其他地区很少见的树果。

magost-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
magost-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨可爱。 在其他地区很少见的树果。

rabuta-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨聪明。 在其他地区很少见的树果。

spelon-berry.short_effect: Used for creating PokéBlocks and Poffins.
spelon-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨可爱。 在其他地区很少见的树果。

watmel-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨聪明。 在其他地区很少见的树果。

durin-berry.short_effect_zh: 用于制作宝可方块， 制作出来的宝可方块可用来打磨聪明。 在其他地区很少见的树果。
